hero.titleHtml:
a silly cloud
built by one person
with a headache.
hero.lede: files go through anubis, then some cloudflare stuff, then land on a raspberry pi sitting on my desk. somehow they come back. that's the whole pitch. not AI-generated (mostly).
hero.ctaNoteNotReady: solve the challange first or no waitlist for u
hero.joinedBody: i'll email you when things are slightly less broken. thank you for tolerating me.

pipes.heading: the file goes through some pipes.
pipes.lede: nothing here is production yet. this is what i'm building.
pipes.foot: game-server hosting is basically the same, except there's no anubis and it uses pterodactyl. might swap pterodactyl for something i wrote myself, haven't decided.

discord.heading: join the discord. it's mostly me.
discord.body: if you want updates before i email people, or want to watch me figure out what a reverse proxy is in real time, the discord's where that happens.

items.a: a very silly, cat-related cloud provider/service, i guess. i was randomly bored one day and thought about making a silly cloud provider. here we are.

items.q: Is it going to be any good?
items.a: so far it isnt finished at all, so i really don't know yet. it's my first ever big project so i don't really know what im doing sometimes. but it'll be the best i can do i guess.

items.q: Is it going to be free?
items.a: most probably. i don't really like paywalls since most of the time they're very expensive. so i'll do what i can do with free tiers i guess (except for the domain of course).

items.q: Did you work the entire day writting this?
items.a: yes, and i have a headache.
either when i have time, or whenever i say in the waitlist email. whichever is later, probably.
because the original PFP is from soggy.cat and it is, objectively, a silly cat. we modified it for light/dark mode and added a blurred halo for light. that's the extent of the branding exercise.

pfp.bodyHtml: the original cat is from soggy.cat. we made a light/dark version and gave it a soft blurred halo on light mode. that's it. that's the remix.

footer.col1Body: made with headaches by one person. hosted on a raspberry pi on a desk.
footer.bottom: © 2026 · not AI-generated (mostly) · thanks for reading this far >:DD

lang.unavailableBody: only english + french are translated so far. the rest are on the to-do list (or open for anyone willing to help). you can still stay in {current} — nothing changed.
